content.scenarioHint: 你和一位新认识的朋友在一家温馨的咖啡馆初次见面，为了打破沉默并营造轻松氛围，你需要主动开启一个友好、自然的对话话题。
expectedAnswers: Hey, thanks for coming! This place has such a nice vibe, don't you think?
It's great to finally meet you! I love how cozy this café is.
Thanks for meeting up — this spot is really charming, isn't it?
Nice to see you! The atmosphere here is so relaxing, right?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否成功以友好方式开启对话并表达对环境的正面评价
语言准确性：语法结构正确，时态和冠词使用无误
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常口语习惯，避免生硬或翻译腔
关键词覆盖：使用了 'cozy', 'charming', 'vibe', 'atmosphere' 等场景相关词

content.speakerText: Hi! I’ve never been to this neighborhood before—what’s your favorite thing about it?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨！我第一次来这个街区——你最喜欢这里哪一点？
expectedAnswers: I love the little bookshop on the corner—it’s got such a chill vibe.
The street art is amazing! Every time I walk by, I notice something new.
It’s peaceful compared to downtown. I come here to unwind after work.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了对方的开放性问题并分享了个人感受
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的形容词和动词搭配
表达自然度：是否避免机械背诵，有口语化表达
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'favorite thing', 'love', 'chill vibe', 'unwind' 等社交关键词

content.speakerText: You made it! I’ve heard so much about your photography—what’s your favorite subject to shoot?
content.speakerTextCn: 你来了！我早就听说你拍摄影像了——你最喜欢拍什么主题？
expectedAnswers: Thanks! I’m really into street photography—it captures real emotions.
I love shooting sunsets. There’s something magical about the golden hour.
People, definitely. I find their expressions tell the most interesting stories.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否感谢对方并具体回应了关于兴趣的问题
语言准确性：是否使用了正确的动词搭配（如 'into', 'shooting', 'capture'）
表达自然度：是否避免生硬回答，有个人情感投入
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'favorite subject', 'love', 'capture', 'emotions' 等表达个人兴趣的关键词
